metadata.description: Private marketplace for logan's Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: global-plugin-dev
plugins.description: Dev/staging build of global-plugin pinned to the dev branch — for pre-promotion testing only.

plugins.name: board
plugins.description: Anti-staleness governance for Claude-Code-driven planning under BOARD/plans/. Hooks enforce frontmatter, splitting rules, and locked-leaf immutability; /board:* commands scaffold initiatives, author and lock SPEC/PLAN leaves, query <board-*> tag blocks, and promote ADRs to docs/ADRS.md.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Superpowers teaches Claude brainstorming, subagent driven development with built in code review, systematic debugging, and red/green TDD. Additionally, it teaches Claude how to author and test new skills.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

plugins.name: prisma
plugins.description: Prisma MCP integration for Postgres database management, schema migrations, SQL queries, and connection string management. Provision Prisma Postgres databases, run migrations, and interact with your data directly.

plugins.name: deploy-on-aws
plugins.description: Deploy applications to AWS with architecture recommendations, cost estimates, and IaC deployment.

plugins.name: semgrep
plugins.description: Semgrep catches security vulnerabilities in real-time and guides Claude to write secure code from the start.
